title: stevia ophryophylla
intro: Stevia ophryophylla, also known as Stevia rebaudiana's relative, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family that is native to South America. The medicinal properties of Stevia ophryophylla include its ability to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stevia ophryophylla are thought to include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce blood sugar levels, and aid in weight management. Herbal preparations of Stevia ophryophylla typically involve drying and processing the leaves to create teas, capsules, or extracts that can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
